props.name: logos
props.description: Array of logo items to display. Each item can be either a React node or an image src.

props.name: speed
props.description: Animation speed in pixels per second. Positive values move based on direction, negative values reverse direction.

props.name: logoHeight
props.description: Height of the logos in pixels.

props.name: fadeOut
props.description: Whether to apply fade-out effect at the edges of the container.

props.name: fadeOutColor
props.description: Color used for the fade-out effect. Only applies when fadeOut is true.

props.name: scaleOnHover
props.description: Whether to scale logos on hover.

props.name: renderItem
props.description: Custom render function for each logo item. Allows full control over item rendering for animations, tooltips, etc.

props.name: ariaLabel
props.description: Accessibility label for the logo loop component.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class names to apply to the root element.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles to apply to the root element.
